verdict: Azelaic acid is a powerhouse ingredient for rosacea, hyperpigmentation, and acne at an exceptional price point. The suspension formula ensures stability and efficacy, though texture can be gritty for sensitive skin.

_research.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
pros: Clinically proven for multiple skin concerns
_research.con: Suspension texture may feel grainy and can be difficult to blend smoothly.
